# ABRAM Network Documentation

> ABRAM is an AI-powered creative production management platform that helps brands scale production and freelancers build careers. It provides tools for AI-powered project intake (Brief Intelligence), crew scheduling, talent matchmaking with suitability scoring, automated invoicing and payouts, utilization calendars, and team management. This is the official help center and user documentation.

## Docs

### Introduction & Concepts

- [Navigation Guide](https://docs.abram.network/docs/user-guide/0.0-agent-and-human-navigation-guide): How to navigate the ABRAM Help Center as a human user or AI co-pilot, with conventions for crewing, invoicing, calendars, and billing ledger guides.
- [Glossary & Acronym Reference](https://docs.abram.network/docs/user-guide/0.1-glossary-and-acronyms): Glossary of key ABRAM Network terms and acronyms covering work packages, milestones, Stripe payouts, intake briefs, crew roles, and billing ledgers.
- [Order of Operations Guide](https://docs.abram.network/docs/user-guide/0.2-order-of-operations): Step-by-step walkthrough of the ABRAM project lifecycle, from intake and scoping through crewing, scheduling, invoicing, and final freelancer payouts.
- [AI Capabilities & Platform Co-pilot](https://docs.abram.network/docs/user-guide/0.3-ai-capabilities-and-copilot): Tour of ABRAM AI features including Brief Intelligence intake, crew matchmaking, resume importer, and the chatbot co-pilot for production tasks.
- [Production Brain & Workspace Memory](https://docs.abram.network/docs/user-guide/0.4-production-brain-and-workspace-memory): How ABRAM Workspace Memory organizes project history, crew rosters, equipment, and intake context to power AI tools tuned to your studio or agency.

### Setup & Team

- [Signing In and Onboarding](https://docs.abram.network/docs/user-guide/1.1-signing-in-and-onboarding): How to sign in to ABRAM, use corporate SSO login portals, and complete the multi-step Onboarding Wizard to choose your workspace role and team.
- [Setting Up Your Profile](https://docs.abram.network/docs/user-guide/1.2-setting-up-your-profile): Build your ABRAM profile with bio details, skills, day rates, portfolio links, and visibility settings for producers, freelancers, and creative crew.
- [Organization Setup & Custom Forms](https://docs.abram.network/docs/user-guide/1.3-organization-setup-and-custom-forms): Upgrade ABRAM to an organization workspace, configure corporate SSO, manage logistics controls, and publish custom producer project intake forms.
- [Team Management & Permissions](https://docs.abram.network/docs/user-guide/1.4-team-management-and-permissions): Add team members to your ABRAM organization, assign Owner, Admin, and Member roles, configure granular permissions, and set workspace capacity limits.
- [Navigating Your Dashboard](https://docs.abram.network/docs/user-guide/1.5-navigating-your-dashboard): How to use, customize, and navigate the client and contractor dashboards on the ABRAM Network.

### Project Intake & Scoping

- [AI Brief Analyzer (Brief Intelligence)](https://docs.abram.network/docs/user-guide/2.1-ai-brief-analyzer): Use ABRAM Brief Intelligence to turn a creative brief into a structured project blueprint with work packages, budgets, timelines, and talent suggestions.
- [Manual Project Creation](https://docs.abram.network/docs/user-guide/2.2-manual-project-creation): Build ABRAM projects by hand through the Manual Setup wizard, choosing preset project types, specs, financial alignments, and ready-made templates.
- [Custom Intake Forms](https://docs.abram.network/docs/user-guide/2.3-custom-intake-forms): Build, customize, and publish ABRAM Custom Producer Request Forms so external partners can submit project briefs that route into your intake inbox.

### Projects & Resources

- [Master Project Detail Page Overview](https://docs.abram.network/docs/user-guide/3.1-master-project-detail-overview): Tour of the ABRAM Master Project Detail Page, covering timelines, tasks, team scheduling, financial tracking, document indexing, and review integrations.
- [Work Packages & Milestones](https://docs.abram.network/docs/user-guide/3.2-work-packages-and-milestones): How to break ABRAM projects into Work Packages, Deliverables, Work Orders, and Payment Milestones to manage scope, hand-offs, and freelancer payouts.
- [Work Orders & Agreements](https://docs.abram.network/docs/user-guide/3.3-work-orders-and-agreements): Use ABRAM Work Orders to book freelancers, internal staff, equipment kits, and vehicles for specific dates, rates, and locations with signed agreements.
- [Task Lists & Tracking](https://docs.abram.network/docs/user-guide/3.4-task-lists-and-tracking): Track deliverables, milestones, and work orders in the ABRAM Tasks Tab, a unified checklist that aggregates every project work item in one workspace.
- [Equipment & Resource Management](https://docs.abram.network/docs/user-guide/3.5-equipment-and-resource-management): Track and schedule production gear, camera kits, lighting, studios, stages, and vehicles from the ABRAM Resource Management dashboard for producers.

### Crewing & Scheduling

- [Internal Talent Search](https://docs.abram.network/docs/user-guide/4.1-internal-talent-search): Search your private ABRAM Crew Roster under Team Management to find vetted producers, freelancers, and production companies you regularly work with.
- [AI Matchmaking Suggestions](https://docs.abram.network/docs/user-guide/4.2-ai-matchmaking-suggestions): How ABRAM AI matchmaking ranks crew suggestions using real-time availability, skills, portfolio history, budget, and working preferences for each project.
- [Inviting & Crew RSVP](https://docs.abram.network/docs/user-guide/4.3-inviting-and-crew-rsvp): Compare ABRAM invitation flows for internal and external freelancers, the AI Chatbot intake path, and the RSVP interface crew use to accept or decline.
- [Managing Your Utilization Calendar](https://docs.abram.network/docs/user-guide/4.4-managing-your-utilization-calendar): Track availability, manage bookings, and log project time in the ABRAM Utilization Calendar so producers see accurate, real-time freelancer schedules.
- [Syncing External Calendars](https://docs.abram.network/docs/user-guide/4.5-syncing-external-calendars): Connect Google Calendar or Microsoft Outlook to ABRAM so external events sync into your availability and feed the AI matchmaking engine in real time.
- [Team Management Dashboard](https://docs.abram.network/docs/user-guide/4.6-team-management-dashboard): Use the ABRAM Team Management dashboard to schedule crew, monitor utilization, resolve booking conflicts, manage rosters, and reuse staffing templates.

### Payments & Financials

- [Freelancer Stripe Express Setup](https://docs.abram.network/docs/user-guide/5.1-freelancer-stripe-setup): Onboard solo freelancers and prime freelancer orgs to Stripe Express on ABRAM, verify identity, and configure bank accounts or debit cards for payouts.
- [Invoicing and Payouts](https://docs.abram.network/docs/user-guide/5.2-invoicing-and-payouts): Generate invoices, manage producer checkout authorizations, approve Purchase Orders, and track Stripe payouts to freelancers across the ABRAM Network.
- [Billing Ledger and AI Credits](https://docs.abram.network/docs/user-guide/5.3-billing-ledger-and-ai-credits): How ABRAM calculates and meters AI credits, how the organization-bound billing ledger tracks usage, and how producer features unlock by balance.
- [Producer Billing and Payments](https://docs.abram.network/docs/user-guide/5.4-billing-and-payments): How producers and organization owners configure payment methods, fund project milestones, manage authorization holds, and reconcile charges on ABRAM.

### Integrations & Collaboration

- [Slack Notifications](https://docs.abram.network/docs/user-guide/6.1-slack-notifications): Connect your Slack workspace to ABRAM to receive real-time milestone, task, review, and invoice updates in your designated production team channels.
- [Frame.io Workspaces](https://docs.abram.network/docs/user-guide/6.2-frameio-workspaces): Link Frame.io to ABRAM project dashboards to browse media assets, track presentation links, and review producer feedback without switching apps.
- [Project Collaboration & File Sharing](https://docs.abram.network/docs/user-guide/6.3-project-collaboration-and-file-sharing): Share files, link external assets, and run @mention feedback threads on every ABRAM project deliverable for tighter crew and producer collaboration.

### FAQs & Support

- [FAQs & Troubleshooting Guide](https://docs.abram.network/docs/user-guide/7.1-faqs-and-troubleshooting): Answers to common ABRAM Network questions plus step-by-step troubleshooting for sign-in, intake, scheduling, Stripe payouts, and integration issues.

## Key Concepts

- Brief Intelligence: AI intake engine that parses creative briefs into structured project plans with roles, deliverables, and budgets
- Work Packages: Logical project phases containing roles, deliverables, milestones, and budget allocations
- Suitability Score: 0–100% crew match rating based on skills, availability, location, and budget fit
- Work Orders: Formal crew booking agreements with rates, dates, and deliverables
- Credit System: Three-pool AI credit consumption model (Monthly Allowance → Trial → Purchased)
- Utilization Calendar: Real-time availability and booking management for crew members
- Production Brain: AI workspace memory that learns from past projects to improve future recommendations

## Links

- [ABRAM App](https://app.abram.network): Main application
- [Help Center](https://docs.abram.network): Documentation and user guides
- [Pricing](https://docs.abram.network/pricing): Plans and pricing
- [Privacy Policy](https://docs.abram.network/privacy-policy): Privacy policy
- [Terms of Use](https://docs.abram.network/terms-of-use): Terms of use
